name: ducat
title: Ducat
description: Add transactions to your Ducat account
author: rahulchowdhury

commands.name: record-transaction
commands.title: Record Transaction
commands.subtitle: Ducat
commands.description: Record an expense or income transaction in your Ducat account using natural language

preferences.name: integrationKey
preferences.title: Integration Key
preferences.description: Create or copy your key from Ducat Settings > Integrations, then paste it here.
preferences.placeholder: Paste your Raycast integration key from Ducat Settings

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
